---
title: "Katherine Amabel Jenner"
---

## Katherine Amabel Jenner

**Dates:** (b. 1876/7)

### Description

third daughter of the Rt. Rev. Henry Jenner

### Biography

Possibly the Amy referred to in the letter to Christabel Coleridge, 1900.  She published religious fiction and plays.

### Letters

- Letter from July 17 [1900]
- Letter from Oct 16th 1896
- Letter from June 16th 1894
- Letter from July 20th 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
